pancho-pineapple.name: Pancho Pineapple with walnut
pancho-pineapple.tagline: A slice of tropical comfort: juicy chocolate biscuit, rich walnuts, and bright pineapple wrapped in velvety cream.
pancho-pineapple.desc: Our flagship. A dome-shaped chocolate biscuit cake layered with soft cream, pineapple, and walnuts, finished with a chocolate drizzle.

rose-velvet.name: Rose Velvet Cloud
rose-velvet.desc: A blush-pink velvet crumb folded with crushed raspberries and the gentlest rosewater cream. Light as the bow on a birthday gift.

cocoa-grove.name: Cocoa Grove Torte
cocoa-grove.desc: Deep, dark, barely-sweet cocoa sponge with rivers of salted caramel and a glossy ganache shell. For the grown-up table.

vanilla-bean.name: Vanilla Bean Sunhat
vanilla-bean.desc: A tender vanilla bean sponge under a wide brim of hand-piped Swiss buttercream ruffles. The one everyone asks for.

lemon-meadow.name: Lemon Meadow
lemon-meadow.desc: Bright, zippy Sicilian lemon curd between olive-oil sponge layers, with a whisper of garden basil. Sunshine on a plate.

chestnut-hush.name: Chestnut Hush
chestnut-hush.desc: Roasted chestnut purée folded through a maple chiffon, blanketed in toasted-meringue. Autumn, distilled.
